scenes.narration: Ye Session 7 of 10 hai API Gateway series me — aaj focus: Kong Nginx AWS gateway products. Bhai, ek mistake jo 90% engineers karte hain — 8 second me batata hu.
Common mistake: wrong choice samjhe bina production me lagaya — scale pe pakda gaya. Aaj ke session me exact reason aur fix dono dekhenge.
API Gateway = building ka security guard + receptionist. Sab requests ek door se, ID-check karta hai, sahi office me bhejta hai, suspicious requests reject. Microservices isi door pe sit karte hain.
Core mechanism: Kong, Nginx, AWS API GW — ye sab terms aaj clear karenge with concrete examples. Yaad rakh, API Gateway ka design choice = scale + cost trade-off.

Tunables: rate limit per-user-per-endpoint, JWT TTL 5-15min + refresh, circuit-breaker failure-threshold 50%/10s, request-timeout 5-30s. Latency budget: gateway adds 1-5ms. Concepts: Kong, Nginx, AWS API GW.
Real example: Netflix Zuul gateway 100B req/day, Resilience4j circuit-breakers per dep. Amazon API Gateway managed service, scales to 10K req/sec out-of-box. PhonePe Kong on-prem for UPI.
Interview line: Kong, Nginx, AWS API GW — ye yaad rakh. Session 7/10 complete. agle session me hum api gateway ka next layer dekhenge.
